servers.name: edgars mcp

integrated_capabilities.notes: Do not register honcho as a separate Cloudflare AI Controls MCP server. edgars-mcp fetches Honcho tools/list and proxies honcho__* tools/call server-side.

servers.notes: Machine route must not be intercepted by Cloudflare Access login HTML. Origin validates Authorization: Bearer. Honcho memory tools are exposed through this server with the honcho__ prefix.

servers.name: cloudflare-api
servers.notes: Use Cloudflare's managed MCP server when the agent needs Cloudflare API access.

deprecated_servers.reason: Replaced by edgars-mcp integrated honcho__* tools. The old facade may remain for debug/fallback, but it should not be added to edgars-entry portal.

machine_access.portal_policy: Service Auth policy on portal Access application
machine_access.server_policy: Service Auth policy on each linked MCP server Access application when Access is used
